title: Verify the published CLASSIFY contract matrix
preconditions: Published binaries and AI Agent Host clients cover every supported and adjacent incompatible CLASSIFY and LEDGER contract version.
steps: Inventory descriptors; exercise every version pair and operation; scan compiled and source references for private LEDGER dependencies.
expected: NFR-CLASSIFY-PUBLIC-CONTRACT-COMPATIBILITY reaches complete descriptor coverage, all incompatibilities fail before data read or mutation, and private Ledger coupling is absent.
